home.title: Home
home.description1: You can manage the codes sent to your authorized accounts on any of our platforms. Contact me if you need to enable any required email address or subject.
home.warning: Any unauthorized email change will automatically block access to the panel until a manual verification is completed.
home.step1: Request the email address where you want to receive the codes and specify the subject corresponding to the purchased platform.
home.step2: Once authorized, you will be able to view and manage associated emails according to your preference.
home.step3: Only previously authorized email addresses will be allowed within the system.
home.step4: Any unauthorized email change will automatically block your account until the case is manually reviewed.
home.supportText: If you need support or additional access, you can contact me via:
home.availability: Check availability for rental accounts or custom domain accounts. Requests to enable email or configure subjects must be handled directly with me.
